name: Fire-Breathing Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a mighty winged dragon standing tall and breathing a swirling stream of fire from its open mouth, large bat-like wings spread wide, a long spiked tail, rows of scales along its back, and sharp claws planted firmly on the rocky ground

name: Cute Baby Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a round chubby baby dragon sitting happily, big sparkly eyes, a small wide smile, tiny stubby wings, two little horn bumps on its head, short legs, and a curled-up tail with a heart-shaped tip

name: Chinese Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a long serpent-like Chinese dragon coiling and weaving through the air, a flowing mane and whiskers, a row of soft spines down its back, four short clawed legs, and a pearl floating near its open friendly mouth

name: Baby Dragon Hatching
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a tiny baby dragon hatching out of a large cracked egg, its head and one little wing peeking over the broken shell, big curious eyes, two more spotted dragon eggs resting in a nest of straw beside it

name: Dragon and Castle
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a friendly dragon flying over a tall fairy-tale castle with pointed towers and waving flags, wings outstretched against a few fluffy clouds, a crescent moon, and rolling hills below the castle walls

name: Sleeping Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a peaceful dragon curled up asleep with its tail wrapped around its body, eyes gently closed, a content smile, folded wings draped over its back, and a few little snore puffs drifting up from its nose

name: Dragon Guarding Treasure
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a proud dragon perched on a big pile of treasure, coins, gems, and a crown scattered around it, wings tucked at its sides, a long tail curling around the gold hoard inside a rocky cave mouth

name: Two-Headed Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a bold two-headed dragon standing on a hilltop, both heads facing slightly different directions with toothy grins, two long necks twisting together, wide spread wings, and a single spiked tail behind it

name: Flying Dragon Over Mountains
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a dragon soaring high through the sky with wings fully spread, body leaning into the wind, a long trailing tail, jagged snowy mountain peaks far below, and a scattering of small clouds around it

name: Easy Toddler Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a very simple round cartoon dragon made of big chunky shapes, a smiling face, two small triangle wings, a stubby tail, and three soft scallop bumps along its back, drawn with plenty of open space to color

name: Dragon Face Close-Up
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a close-up of a friendly dragon's face filling the frame, large expressive eyes, two curved horns, textured scales across the cheeks and snout, flared nostrils, and a hint of small fangs in a gentle smile

name: Knight and Dragon
subject: fantasy/dragon
prompt: a brave little knight in armor holding a shield standing face to face with a large but playful dragon, the dragon tilting its head curiously, a few rocks and a small banner between them on a grassy field
